items.title: A guide to targeting with Sponsored Products
items.excerpt: Discover tips to help you drive sales through targeting with Sponsored Products.
items.body: Guide A simple guide to effective targeting with Sponsored Products Tips to help you drive sales through targeting with Sponsored Products. Table of contents 1 . An introduction to Sponsored Products targeting What is targeting? 2 . Targeting options with Sponsored Products Automatic targeting Manual targeting Negative targeting Deciding which targeting strategy 3 . Automatic targeting with Sponsored Products Remember this When to choose automatic targeting Just getting started with Sponsored Products? Already have active manual campaigns? 4 . Manual targeting (keywords) with Sponsored Products More about match types Remember this Top tips Keyword types Do your research To note, for Kindle Direct Publishing (KDP) authors and book vendors Choose keyword targeting when: 5 . Manual targeting (product) with Sponsored Products Remember this Choose product targeting when: 6 . Negative targeting with Sponsored Products Consider adding the following as negative keywords Remember this 7 . Setting up strategic targeting for Sponsored Products campaigns How to be strategic Start by defining your business goals Next, choose your campaign strategy 6 tips to remember How campaign structure can impact advertising performance 8 . Sponsored Products targeting checklist An introduction to Sponsored Products targeting Strong targeting is crucial to build a solid foundation for your Sponsored Products campaigns, and can help to match shoppers intents to your products. What is targeting? Targeting is the way you define the context in which you want your ads to appear. That can be done in multiple ways. The most common is the use of keywords that match your ad with the shopping queries customers use when looking for something online. This guide will explore everything you need to know about...

items.title: SP-API Release Notes
items.excerpt: Selling Partner API new features, software updates, and changelog.
items.body: For releases prior to January 19, 2022, refer to Announcements in the Selling Partner API GitHub repo . April 29, 2026 API changes External Fulfillment Shipping v2024-09-11 Added support for the Easy Ship program for US domestic shipments. Added drop-off location details, such as the address, map URL, and distance, for shipments that the seller delivers to nearby drop-off locations. Added support for US customary units. Fulfillment Outbound v2020-07-01 Updated the getPackageTrackingDetails operation with two new eventCode values to support locker delivery: EVENT_801 : Package delivered to locker. EVENT_804 : Package picked up from locker. Orders API v2026-01-01 Added TAX and PAYMENT attributes to the getOrders and searchOrders operations to address discrepancies between Orders v0 and Orders v2026-01-01. These discrepancies include Order.PaymentExecutionDetail , Order.PaymentMethod , Order.PaymentMethodDetails , Order.IsIBA , Order.ElectronicInvoiceStatus , Order.BuyerInvoicePreference , Order.BuyerTaxInformation , Order.MarketplaceTaxInfo , Order.SellerDisplayName , Order.BuyerInfo.BuyerTaxInfo , OrderItem.TaxCollection , OrderItem.DeemedResellerCategory , OrderItem.SerialNumberRequired , and OrderItem.AssociatedItems . Documentation changes Added pricing validation details to the Listings Items API and Product Pricing API guides. This feature allows users to detect and fix pricing problems before submission or production impact. Added the attribute updates to Orders API Migration Guide and Access Orders PII guide. Added the Get Tax Information guide for the Orders API. Deprecation notices Deprecated SP-API resources are no longer in active development. Calls to deprecated SP-API resources will fail as of their removal date. For a complete list of SP-API deprecations,...

items.title: # 运营案例分析 # 高客单价FBM新品开售1个月了，转化都上不去，广告表现也一般，是产品问题还是推广问题？推广一个月期间，我尝试投放站外，效果时好时差......
items.excerpt: 大家好，我先简单介绍一下产品的情况。这个产品走的是类目里节省空间的特点，属于常规品；和类目内产品对比，尺寸更小，适合小空间使用。目前售价在 $110-$140 区间（海外仓发货）。 竞品有四个：前两个价格都比我的高 20 美元以上，评论数也比我多；后面两个和我的产品一模一样，其中一个价格偏低，为 79 美元 + 19 美元配送费（评论多，但评分较低）；另一个定价区间和我一样（评论少，评分数和我一样）。 这四个竞品的排名都比我好，其中两...

items.title: 3年亚马逊运营准备全职单干，向各位前辈请教：面临供应链和物流劣势，单干初期该如何避免盲区、克服地域限制并确保资金链安全？
items.excerpt: 小弟目前26岁，目前在北美站主要做Amazon，有三年多的运营经验。 技能储备： 跑过完整的产品生命周期，目前主要接触的是婴童、宠物产品，手头有几款爆款（但暂时没提成）。平时习惯用AI工具辅助数据分析和视觉内容生成，在运营推新上有一点个人心得，同时我也相信自己有能力。 单干原因：为什么想单干呢？因为个人原因还是想在成都发展，但这边的跨境环境一言难尽啊，优秀的、能学到真东西的公司真的不多，大部分都是铺货/精铺，而且发展潜力比不上沿海地区...

items.title: 总结贡献全新的亚马逊选品3大思路
items.excerpt: 选品思路 跟大家分享我选品的方向 一．选择本土优秀店铺 二．选择客户群体 三．选择参考类型 1. 选择店铺做参考方向 之前的我发过一个文章，是就是关于选择本土一些优秀店铺作为参考，长期跟踪店铺，因为他们他们更能知道什么产品更会得到本国人的欢迎。而且如果你仔细发现就会知道，他们做生意跟我们是一样的，不会说只卖同一个类型的东西，一样的在合理的情况下，客户需要什么，喜欢什么，他们就卖什么。本土店铺是比榜单更早反应客户需求的一个地方。 我们排...

items.title: # 运营案例分析 # 高客单价（$250-$300区间）FBM新品开售5天了，3个手动广告几乎没展现没点击，是链接问题还是FBM本来就没流量？
items.excerpt: 大家好，我先简单的介绍一下产品的情况，产品走的是高客单价的高端路线，偏商用，目前的售价是$250-$300区间，竞品价格比我们便宜，评论比我们的多，但是公司产品比竞品有一些功能上的优势。 目前这个公司主张白帽运营，不送测，不刷单，FBM，高客单价，走高端商用市场，自己用AI作图，目前亚马逊运营就我 还有一个美工转运营（之前是这家公司的美工 运营离职之后 老板让她接手店铺运营），说的有些偏了 新品上架 我是给了一个50美金的优惠券 我一...

items.title: #749 - From $100K To $7M On Amazon
items.excerpt: How did one Amazon brand go from overlooked to $7M? Discover the keyword, SEO, AI, and pricing strategies that helped unlock massive growth.
items.body: How did one Amazon brand go from overlooked to $7M? Discover the keyword, SEO, AI, and pricing strategies that helped unlock massive growth. 💰Get Helium 10 with a special discount to start or scale your e-commerce business here: https://h10.me/h10 ► Watch The Podcasts On Youtube: https://www.youtube.com/@Helium10SeriousSellersPodcast?sub_confirmation=1 ► Instagram: instagram.com/serioussellerspodcast ► Free Amazon Seller Chrome Extension: https://h10.me/extension ► Sign Up For Helium 10: https://h10.me/signup (Use SSP10 To Save 10% For Life) ► Learn How To Sell on Amazon: https://h10.me/ft In this episode of the Serious Sellers Podcast, Bradley Sutton welcomes Andrew Bell to talk about the real Amazon operator experience behind his AI and listing optimization expertise. Andrew shares his journey from growing up in small-town Indiana and studying ancient Greek and preaching to eventually diving deep into business, SEO, Amazon strategy, and AI-powered workflows. Andrew breaks down how he helped Touch of Class, a niche home decor brand, grow from around $100,000 annually on Amazon to $7 million per year. He explains how he used Freedom Ticket, Helium 10 tools, keyword research, listing optimization, FBA, competitor tracking, and category-level keyword lists to turn thousands of niche products into a much stronger Amazon catalog. He also shares how the Amazon Brand Store became a major growth driver, with around $1 million in sales coming through store activity after treating it like an SEO page that could rank on Google. Bradley and Andrew also dive into the relationship between Amazon SEO, PPC, and Rufus, now Alexa for Shopping. Andrew explains why keywords still matter, but sellers also need to optimize for customer intent, use cases, benefits, pricing transparency, an...

items.title: 小团队起步做亚马逊+TK，到底是“借工厂现有账号”好，还是“从零自建”好？

Do not send a weak appeal and hope Amazon changes its mind; get a real reinstatement plan before the accou...
items.body: Amazon account deactivation can happen after video call verification when fraud concerns are flagged. Sellers may need to appeal, explain wrong information, and address why Amazon saw the account as risky. items.title: #748 - 7-Figure Amazon Strategies From Eastern Europe
items.excerpt: Seven-figure Amazon sellers from Bulgaria and Romania reveal EU marketplace strategies, Prime Day tactics, ranking tips, Rufus optimization, and how they built brands across Amazon marketplaces.
items.body: Seven-figure Amazon sellers from Bulgaria and Romania reveal EU marketplace strategies, Prime Day tactics, ranking tips, Rufus optimization, and how they built brands across Amazon marketplaces. ► Watch The Podcasts On Youtube: https://www.youtube.com/@Helium10SeriousSellersPodcast?sub_confirmation=1 ► Instagram: instagram.com/serioussellerspodcast ► Free Amazon Seller Chrome Extension: https://h10.me/extension ► Sign Up For Helium 10: https://h10.me/signup (Use SSP10 To Save 10% For Life) ► Learn How To Sell on Amazon: https://h10.me/ft What does it take to build a seven-figure Amazon business from Eastern Europe? In this episode, Bradley Sutton travels to Sofia, Bulgaria, to speak with experienced sellers from Bulgaria and Romania who have built successful brands across Amazon Europe and the U.S. marketplace. From workwear and cosmetics to pet supplements and ranking services, these sellers share how they found opportunities, scaled their businesses, and adapted as Amazon continued to evolve. The first story follows Iliyan Ivanov, a seller who started in advertising and eventually turned local workwear demand into a multi-million-euro Amazon brand. He explains how starting early in Amazon Europe gave his listings maturity, how Germany became his top marketplace, and how keyword research helped uncover unexpected seasonal demand around Germany’s carnival season. He also shares how tools like Cerebro and Managed Refund Services helped his team with listing strategy, keyword targeting, and recovering money from Amazon reimbursement opportunities. Next, Bradley talks with another Bulgarian seller, Milcho Vasilkov, who used product research to enter categories he was not personally connected to, including maternity products, cosmetics, grocery, and pet supplements. His st...
